testsuite.name: Scenario: waiting without enough cucumbers should not growl

testcase.name: Given I have eaten 0 cukes
testcase.classname: Scenario: waiting without enough cucumbers should not growl

testcase.name: When I wait 2 hour
testcase.classname: Scenario: waiting without enough cucumbers should not growl

testcase.name: Then my belly should not growl
testcase.classname: Scenario: waiting without enough cucumbers should not growl

testcase.name: classMethod
testcase.classname: Scenario: waiting without enough cucumbers should not growl

testsuite.system-out: I'm eating 0 cukes! I ate 0 cucumbers.
